criteria.name: Empathy and Professionalism
criteria.description: Assesses whether the agent acknowledges the customer's frustration and responds with empathy, respect, and a calm tone.

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: Dismissive, impatient, or fails to acknowledge the customer's frustration.

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Acknowledges the issue but empathy or professionalism is inconsistent.

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Clearly acknowledges frustration, apologizes appropriately, and maintains a respectful, calm tone throughout.

criteria.name: Information Gathering
criteria.description: Evaluates whether the agent asks for the right details to investigate the charge efficiently (e.g., date, amount, context).

levels.label: Insufficient
levels.description: Fails to request key details or asks irrelevant questions.

levels.label: Mostly Sufficient
levels.description: Requests some key details but misses at least one important piece of information.

levels.label: Complete
levels.description: Requests the necessary details clearly and confirms them before proceeding.

criteria.name: Clarity of Explanation
criteria.description: Evaluates how clearly the agent explains what happened and what will be done to resolve it.

levels.label: Unclear
levels.description: Explanation is confusing, vague, or incomplete.

levels.label: Clear
levels.description: Explanation is understandable but missing structure or key details (timeline/next steps).

levels.label: Very Clear
levels.description: Explanation is structured, easy to follow, includes next steps and timeline, and checks for understanding.

criteria.name: Resolution Completeness
criteria.description: Assesses whether the agent fully resolves the issue and communicates required follow-up actions (e.g., confirmation email, expected credit timing).

levels.label: Incomplete
levels.description: Issue is not resolved or the customer is left without a clear next step.

levels.label: Mostly Complete
levels.description: Issue is addressed but follow-up details are incomplete or not confirmed.

levels.label: Complete
levels.description: Issue is resolved with clear confirmation, timeline, and follow-up actions communicated.

criteria.name: Call Closure
criteria.description: Evaluates whether the agent confirms resolution, offers additional help, and closes politely and professionally.

levels.label: Abrupt
levels.description: Ends without confirming resolution or without courtesy.

levels.label: Acceptable
levels.description: Closes politely but misses confirmation or an offer of further help.

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Confirms resolution, offers further assistance, and closes with clear, courteous language.

relatedMaterials.description: Contoso Customer Support Tone and Courtesy Guidelines
